lines.text: Monica, Chandler, and Phoebe's, everyone is there and they are finishing watching the first episode of Mac and C.H.E.E.S.E. Joey is of course Mac.

lines.speaker: Mac
lines.text: (on TV) Well, if we learned one thing today C.H.E.E.S.E. is that cheerleaders and high explosives don't mix. (Cut to Joey laughing while Rachel, Chandler, and Monica aren't amused.)

lines.speaker: C.H.E.E.S.E
lines.text: You can say that again Mac.

lines.speaker: Mac
lines.text: Well, I couldn't have done it without you buddy. You're a genius.

lines.speaker: C.H.E.E.S.E
lines.text: Oh yeah? Well then how come I can't get my VCR to stop blinking 12:00?
They both break into a huge laugh and do that stop motion thing they had at the end of ChiPs.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (laughing and turning off the TV) So, what did you guys think?
They all make happy faces as they are unable to express their feelings verbally. Finally, the phone rings and the race to answer it is won by Monica.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (on phone) Hello? (Listens) Hold on please. Joey, it's your mom. (Hands him the phone.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: It's your mommy. It's your mommy.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Ohhhh...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: That's nice.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (on phone) Mom, so what did you think? (He walks away allowing the gang a chance to figure out what they're gonna say.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well that was umm...Okay.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: It wasn't the best.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: That was one of the worse things ever. And not just on TV.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Wh-what are we gonna tell him?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well, the lighting was okay.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ohh no you don't! You got lighting last time, lighting is mine!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: And I have costumes.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh great! That means I'm stuck with, "So, we were watching you in there (Points to the TV) and you were sittin' right here! Whoa!"
Phoebe gets up.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What are you gonna do Pheebs?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I don't know. I don't know. I can't lie to him again. Oh no I-no! I'm just gonna press my breasts up against him.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: And say nothing?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Uh-huh, yeah that's right.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (hangs up the phone) Wow! Well, my folks really liked it! So what-what did you guys think? (Phoebe smiles, walks up to him, and presses her breasts against him.) It wasn't that good.
Opening Credits
Central Perk, Phoebe and Monica are reading on the couch.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Phoebe, do you think that your favorite animal says much about you?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What? You mean behind my back?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (entering, excitedly) Oh! Hi you guys, oh my God! You'll never gonna believe happened to me today! I am sitting in my office and...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (entering from bathrooms excitedly) You guys! You guys! You're not gonna believe what my agent just told me!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Joey! Kinda in the middle of a story here!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ooh, sorry. Sorry. You finish, go.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay, so anyway I'm sittin' in my office and guess who walks in.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I'm gonna be on two TV shows!

lines.speaker: Monica and Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, that's great!!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Joey!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, you weren't finished?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah! Guess who walks into my office is the end of my story. (To Monica and Phoebe) It was Ralph Lauren! (Monica and Phoebe gasp) Ralph Lauren walked into my office!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Uh Rach, if you're gonna start another story, at least let me finish mine.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: It's the same story.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (groans in disgust) Wow, it's really long.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (ignoring him) Anyway, Ralph just came in to tell me that he's so happy with my work that he wants me to be the new merchandising manager for polo retail.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Still get a discount on wedding dresses?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I'm so happy for you!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well, these really are the days of our lives.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well, since you ask. They want me back on Days of Our Lives!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (gasps) Oh God!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I got-I get a big pay raise!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh hey!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I'll be playing Drake Remoray's twin brother, Stryker!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oooh!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I get to hire my own assistant!

lines.speaker: Monica and Phoebe
lines.text: Ahhh!!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (jumps up) Well-I got a head rush from standing up to fast right there.
Rachel's New Office, she's interviewing a potential new assistant, Hilda.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (reading the resume) And you were at this job for four years?

lines.speaker: Hilda
lines.text: That's right.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay, well this is all very impressive Hilda, um I just have one last question for you. Uh, how did I do? Was this okay?

lines.speaker: Hilda
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I've never interviewed anyone before. I've actually never had anyone work for me before. Although when I was a kid, we did have a maid, but this is-this isn't the same thing.

lines.speaker: Hilda
lines.text: No dear. It's not.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No. Yeah, and I know that. All right, well thank you so much for coming in it was nice to meet you.

lines.speaker: Hilda
lines.text: Thank you! Good meeting you.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: All right. (Hilda exits) I'm a total pro!
There's a knock on the door and a handsome man enters.

lines.speaker: Man
lines.text: Hello?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (seeing him) Wow! H-umm! Hi! Yes, uh I'm sorry the models are actually down the hall.

lines.speaker: Man
lines.text: Actually, I'm here about the assistant job.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Really?! (Taking his resume) Okay well then, all right, well just have a seat there. Umm, so what's-what is-what's your name?

lines.speaker: Man
lines.text: Tag Jones.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Uh-huh, go on.

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: That's it. That's my whole name.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: That's your whole name, okay of course it is! Okay, well let's-let's just have a look-see here. (Looking at his resume)

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: I know I haven't worked in an office before, and I really don't have a lot of experience, but uh...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh come on, what are you talking about? You've got three years painting houses. Two whole summers at T.G.I. Friday's, come on!

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: It's lame, I know. But I'm a goal-oriented person, very eager to learn...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay, hold on just a second. (She grabs a camera out of the desk and takes his picture.) I'm sorry, it's for human resources, everybody has to do it. Could you just stand up please?
Central Perk, Chandler is sitting on the couch when some unknown guy comes in and sits in their easy chair.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No-no-no-no. (Waves him away as Monica and Phoebe enter whispering to each other.) Hey! (Monica shushes him.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (To Monica) Anyway, I should go. Okay, bye.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (To Chandler) Hey sweetie.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hi sweetie. So, what was with all the whispering?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I can't tell you. It's a secret.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Secret? Married people aren't supposed to have secrets between one another. We have too much love and respect for one another.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Awww. (Kisses him.) But still no.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No I'm serious, we should tell each other everything. I do not have any secrets from you.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Really? Okay, so why don't you tell me what happened to Ross Junior year at Disneyland?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh no-no, I can't do that.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: If you tell me, I'll tell you what Phoebe said.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: So, Ross and I are going to Disneyland and we stop at this restaurant for tacos. And when I say restaurant, I mean a guy, a hibachi, and the trunk of his car. So Ross has about 10 tacos. And anyway, we're on Space Mountain and Ross starts to feel a little iffy.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh my God. He threw up?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No, he visited a little town south of throw up. (Monica laughs hysterically.) So what was Phoebe's secret?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, Nancy Thompson from Phoebe's old massage place is getting fired.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: That's it?! I gave up my Disneyland story for that?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: That's right! You lose sucker!! (Pause) Please still marry me.
Monica, Chandler, and Phoebe's, Chandler, Rachel, and Phoebe are there.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Chandler, you have an assistant right?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (angrily) Did she call? You-you told her I was sick right? Always tell her I am sick!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No, I-I just don't know how you decide who to hire. I mean I've got it narrowed down to two people. One of them has great references and a lot of experience and then there's this guy...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What about him?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I love him. He's so pretty I wanna cry! I don't know what to do. Tell me what to do.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Come on you know what to do! You hire the first one! You don't hire an assistant because they're cute, you hire them because they're qualified.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Uh-huh. No, I hear what you're saying and-and-and that makes a lot of sense but can I just say one more thing? (Takes out his picture.) Look how pretty!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Let's see. (Looking at the picture) Oh my God! Oh... But no! No! You can't-you can't hire him, because that-it's not professional. Umm, this is for me (The picture) yes? Thanks. (Puts it in her pocket.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay you're right. I'll hire Hilda tomorrow. Dumb old perfect for the job Hilda!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Let me see this guy. (Phoebe hands him the picture.) W-H-Wow! Don't show this to Monica! And don't tell her about the W-H-Wow!
The Days of Our Lives producer's office, Joey is entering to find Terry there.

lines.speaker: Terry
lines.text: Hey-hey-hey Joey!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey Terry!

lines.speaker: Terry
lines.text: Good to see you again!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: It's been a while, huh? Wow, it's funny these halls look smaller then they used to.

lines.speaker: Terry
lines.text: It's a different building.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: So! Stryker Remoray huh? When do you want me to start?

lines.speaker: Terry
lines.text: Why don't we start right now!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Terry
lines.text: Here are the audition scenes. (Holds out the script.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (looking between the pages and him) Audition? I thought you were gonna offer me the part.

lines.speaker: Terry
lines.text: Why would you think that?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well, I was Dr. Drake Remoray, Stryker's twin brother. I mean, who looks more me than me right?

lines.speaker: Terry
lines.text: Everybody has to audition.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Y'know Terry, I-I don't really need to do this. I got my own cable TV series, (Pause) with a robot.

lines.speaker: Terry
lines.text: I'm sorry Joey that's...that's the way it is.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well. I guess you think you're pretty special huh? Sittin' up here in your fancy small hall building. Makin' stars jump through hoops for ya, huh? Well y'know what? (Throws the script away) This is one star who's hoop... This is a star that the hoop-this hoop-I was Dr. Drake Remoray!
Rachel's office, she's there as Tag knocks on the door and enters carrying a plant.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hi! Tag. What are you doing here?

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: I just wanted to come by and thank you for not laughing in my face yesterday. And I noticed there aren't any plants in your office so I wanted to bring you your first... (Notices her plant) There is a plant in your office.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Kinda.

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: Right. So I guess I shouldn't put good at noticing stuff on my resume. (Sets the plant down on her desk.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh-ohh, thank you.

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: Anyway, I'm guessing you hired somebody.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well...

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: Gotcha. Thanks again for meeting with me. (Starts to leave.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: But I hired you!

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah! You-you got the job! You're my new assistant!

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: I am?!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah!

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: I can't believe it!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Me either. Umm, all right, first thing I need you to do is go downstairs and find a women named Hilda and tell her to go home.
Monica, Chandler, and Phoebe's, Monica is setting the table for dinner as Chandler enters.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey! Good, you're home!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh it's always nicer to here than, "Aw crap! You again!"

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey baby. (Kisses him.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I made you a surprise.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh yeah?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah, tacos! Ever since you told me that story I've had such a craving for them.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Did you not understand the story?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (entering) Hey!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey! What's up?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Ross!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh, nothin' much. Just trying to figure out what I'm gonna do for dinner.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Huh.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (notices the table) Hey-Ooh! What's-what's that, dinner stuff? You making dinner?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No! (The oven dings.) Shhh!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What you got over there? Tacos?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No! No. They're umm... They're just uh...ground beef smileys. (Holding up one of the shells.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Uhh, those are tacos.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Excuse me Mr. Mexico.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Eh, either way I'll pass. (Quietly to Chandler) I still can't eat those. (Monica is getting something out of the fridge and starts laughing.) What's so funny?!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (trying not to laugh) I'm not laughing.
Ross and Chandler move closer to her and she starts laughing again.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (To Chandler) You told her!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Nancy Thompson's getting fired! (Monica slaps him on the shoulder.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (To Monica) Look, okay-okay I had food poisoning! It's not like I choose to do it! It's not like-It's not like I said, "Umm, what would make this ride more fun?!"

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You're right. I mean I'm sorry. Yeah, I shouldn't be laughing. I should be laying down papers for you! (Runs off laughing which gets Chandler laughing.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (To Chandler) How could you tell her?!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I had too okay?! We're getting married! Married couples can't keep secrets from one another!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh really? Well I-I guess Monica should know about Atlantic City.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Du-ude!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (running up to Ross) What happened in Atlantic City?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well, Chandler and I are in a bar...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Did you not hear me say, "Du-ude?!"

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: And this girl is making eyes at Chandler, okay? So after awhile he-he goes over to her and uh, after a minute or two, I see them kissing. Now, I know what you're thinking, Chandler's not the type of guy who just goes to bars and makes out with girls, and you're right, Chandler's not the type of guy who just goes to bars and makes out with...girls.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (To Chandler) You kissed a guy?!! Oh my God.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: In my defense, it was dark and he was a very pretty guy.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh Mon, I laughed so hard...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Ho-ho, so hard we had to throw out your underwear again?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Whatever dude, you kissed a guy.
Commercial Break
Joey and Rachel's, Phoebe is giving Joey a massage as Rachel enters.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey-Ooh, how's Hilda? Is she working out?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ohh, my new assistant is working out, yes.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Was she happy you gave her the job?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, my-my new assistant has very happy that I hired my new assistant.
The phone rings and Joey answers it.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (on phone) Hello? (Listens) Oh hey! Can you, can you hang on a second? (To Phoebe and Rachel) It's the producers over at Mac and C.H.E.E.S.E. can you excuse me for a minute? (On phone) Hey, funny you should call. I was just looking over next week's script. (Listens) Canceled?! (Listens) Like they're taking it off the air? (Listens) Ohh. (Listens) All right, see you Monday. (Listens) We're not even shootin' them anymore?!! (Listens) All right, bye! (Hangs up) They canceled Mac and C.H.E.E.S.E!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Sorry.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I'm sorry Joey.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Why would they do that?! It was a good show right?!
Phoebe and Rachel both pause, look at each other, and go press their breasts against him. Which Joey doesn't mind, of course.
Monica, Chandler, and Phoebe's, Chandler, Monica, and Ross are still giving away all of their secrets.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You wanna tell secrets?! Okay! Okay! In college, Ross used to wear leg warmers!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: All right! All right! Chandler entered a Vanilla Ice look-a-like contest and won!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Ross came in forth and cried!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh my God! (Laughing)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh, is that funny?! Oh, you-you find that funny?! Well maybe Chandler should know some of your secrets too!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I-I already told him everything! (Threateningly) You shush!!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Once Monica was sent to her room without dinner, so she ate the macaroni off a jewelry box she'd made.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Ross used to stay up every Saturday night to watch Golden Girls!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Monica couldn't tell time 'til she was 13!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: It's hard for some people!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (To Monica) Of course it is. (Mouths to Ross) Wow-whoa!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Chandler one time wore my underwear to work!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey!!!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Ohh, I'm sorry I couldn't think of anymore for Ross!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Ohh! Ohh! In college, Chandler got drunk and slept with the lady who cleaned our dorm!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: That was you!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Whatever dude, you kissed a guy.
Joey and Rachel's, Joey is still bumming about cancellation of Mac and C.H.E.E.S.E.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: How could this happen to me?! Yesterday I had two TV shows! Today, I got nothin'!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well wait a minute, what happened to Days of Our Lives?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Uh, well they might be a little mad at me over there.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What happened?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well maybe I got a little upset and maybe I told them where they could go.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Joey, why would you do that?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Because they wanted me to audition!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You! An actor?! That's madness!
Rachel's Outer Office, Tag is sitting at his desk as Rachel walks up. She stops and watches him pick up the phone.

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: Rachel Green's office. (Hangs up.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Tag? (He turns and looks at her.) Hi, who was that?

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: (shyly) Nobody. I was just practicing.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Really? (Giggles.)
Phoebe rounds the corner.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: Hi! Rachel Green's office.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You must be Hilda.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah, this is Tag. Tag, this is Phoebe. Phoebe, can I see you for a second? (Goes into office.)

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: Phoebe! That's a great name.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, you like that? You should hear my phone number.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (grabbing Phoebe) Okay. We'll be right back. (They go into her office and she closes the door.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: So you hired yourself a little treat did ya?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: All right I know, I know how it looks Pheebs, but I'm telling you...

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: But-but you know you cannot get involved with your assistant.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yes, I know that. I know that. And I know that hiring him was probably not the smartest thing that I've ever done. But I'm telling you, from this moment on I swear this is strictly professional. (There's a knock on the door.) Yes?
Kathy enters (Because she's listed in the credits).

lines.speaker: Kathy
lines.text: Hey Rachel!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Kathy
lines.text: Cute assistant! What's his story? Is he...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Gay? Yeah. (Kathy leaves dejectedly.)
Terry's office, Joey has come to beg for a second chance.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey! Terry.

lines.speaker: Terry
lines.text: Joey Tribbiani! I'm surprised your big head could fit through our small halls! (Gets up) I gotta go Joey.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Wait! Terry! Wait-Look-Wait I-I... Look, I'm really sorry about before. I was an idiot thinking I'm too big to audition for you. You gotta give me another chance.

lines.speaker: Terry
lines.text: I can't help you Joey.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Wait! Terry! Please! Look, I just lost my other job. Okay? You have no idea how much I need this. Please, help me out, for old times sake.
[Cut to a hospital room set on the Days of Our Lives stage. Two nurses are standing next to a bed with a man whose face is completely covered in bandages and reading his chart.]
Nurse #1: This poor guy's been in a coma for five years. It's hopeless.
Nurse #2: It's not hopeless! Dr. Stryker Remoray's a miracle worker. Look, here he comes.
Stryker enters, only it's not Joey playing him.

lines.speaker: Dr. Stryker Remoray
lines.text: Good morning. (He walks over to the bed, leans down, and whispers to him.) Drake, it's your brother Stryker. Can you hear me?

lines.speaker: The Director
lines.text: And cut!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (jumping up and removing the bandages) I'm back baby! Ha-ha-ha!
Central Perk, Chandler, Monica, and Ross are sitting there and not talking to each other.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Y'know, in my defense, umm there was no glitter on the macaroni and very little glue.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: And in my defense, the cleaning lady came on to me!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (To Monica) You have no trouble telling time now right?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Quick! What time is it?! (Holds his watch in front of her face.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I don't know! Time to kiss a guy maybe?! (Ross laughs.) What are you laughing at Pampers? (He stops laughing and glares at her.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Y'know when I said that because we're getting married that we should share everything and not have any secrets?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah that was stupid. Let's not do that.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Ohh, absolutely.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: And! We should keep all the stuff uh, we told each other secret from everybody else.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah, definitely!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay, (gets up) if you'll excuse me, I-I'm gonna go hang out with some people who don't know the Space Mountain story.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Then, I'd steer clear of Phoebe.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Man! (Monica mouths, "I'm sorry.")

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, and not that you would, but I wouldn't hang out with...all the guys in my office.
Ross storms out.
Ending Credits
Rachel's office, she's looking at a picture of Tag when he knocks and enters.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (noticing him) Hi! (Puts the pictures away.)

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: Do you have a minute?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well yeah, sure, what's up?

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: I got asked out twice today when I was at lunch...by guys.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh really?!

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: Yeah. Did you tell someone that I was gay?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, did you not want people to know that?

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: But I'm not gay. And I especially wouldn't want you to think I was gay.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Why's that?

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: I don't think I should say.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ohh, you can say. Come on, I don't want you to feel like you can't tell me things. (Motions for him to sit down.)

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: 'Kay.

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: Well...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: I'd love to ask out your friend Phoebe.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (Pause) Yeah, she's gay.
End
